message: Unchanged cutoff search tested 1%-25% and found no qualifying cutoff; explicit 7% fallback retained.
23 completed source rows were excluded because one or both mapped teams were outside the 206-team prior universe; see audit/excluded_matches.csv.
France-England on 2026-07-18 was unfinished and excluded. Spain-Argentina on 2026-07-19 is outside the cutoff and was not processed.
Cumulative Stage 1 + Stage 2 per-team eligible match counts are a new Stage 3 confidence layer; all adjusted-goal and simulation formulas remain Stage 2.
Original saved aggregated_xg_data contains Stage 2 counts, so Stage 1 counts were deterministically recounted from the frozen results snapshot and Stage 1 prior universe.
calculate_caps_off_def.py outputs are recorded but are not consumed by the unchanged production calculate_xg_xga.py, which retains its literal cap of 6.
